martinbaud

Software craftsman · Retro game archaeologist

martinbaud.github.io · aeryflux.com

## Pro — AeryFlux

Building [**AeryFlux**](https://github.com/aeryflux) — interactive globe experiences with NLP.

| Project | Description | Status |
|---------|-------------|--------|
| [**geojsonto3D**](https://github.com/martinbaud/geojsonto3D) | GeoJSON → 3D globe models | 🟢 Production |
| [lumos](https://github.com/aeryflux/lumos) | Landing page | 🟡 Alpha |
| [globe](https://github.com/aeryflux/globe) | npm: @aeryflux/globe | 🟡 Alpha |
| [xenova-bridge](https://github.com/aeryflux/xenova-bridge) | npm: @aeryflux/xenova-bridge | 🟡 Alpha |
| [haki](https://github.com/aeryflux/haki) | Learn-to-code platform | 🟡 Alpha |

<sub>TypeScript · Three.js · Hono · Transformers.js</sub>
